allow: Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run alembic --help | head -5)

Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run python -c "from alembic.config import Config; c = Config\('alembic.ini'\); print\('Alembic config OK, script_location:', c.get_main_option\('script_location'\)\)")

Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run python -c "
from src.config import settings
print\('database_url:', settings.database_url\)
print\('base_url:', settings.base_url\)
print\('is_lambda:', settings.is_lambda\)
")

Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run python -c "
from src.main import app
print\('FastAPI app title:', app.title\)
print\('Routes:', [r.path for r in app.routes]\)
")
